channel.title: The Athletic - Ohio State Buckeyes (College Football)
channel.description: Ohio State Buckeyes college football news from The Athletic (NYTimes).

item.title: Ohio State lands 5-star receiver Jett Harrison, brother of Marvin Harrison Jr.
item.description: Harrison follows his brother's path to Ohio State as the Buckeyes continue to land elite receivers.

item.title: Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: I’m back after a two-week European holiday. Ready to dive back into your questions. Please include your city.

item.title: What 5-star Marcus Fakatou committing to Ohio State over Georgia, Texas means for Buckeyes
item.description: Marcus Fakatou, a five-star defensive lineman from California, picked Ohio State over Georgia and Texas on Monday.

item.title: In college football, tie games have been dead for 30 years. It’s time to bring them back
item.description: These ambiguous and at times confusing results have gotten a bad rap. Their mere presence unlocks a whole new level of strategy (and chaos).

item.title: Southern California recruiting confidential: High school coaches on USC, UCLA, NIL and more
item.description: USC and UCLA are both impressing local high school coaches with their work on the recruiting trail. That hasn't always been the case.

item.title: I watched 10 college football games from the 1990s. Here's what has (and hasn't) changed
item.description: A '90s college football binge revealed many things I didn’t know I’ve been taking for granted to the debates we still haven’t settled.

item.title: Ohio State plans for $125 million football facility upgrade, $500 million athletics budget
item.description: Ohio State athletic director Ross Bjork spoke Thursday about moving forward with big upgrades to the Woody Hayes Athletic Center.

item.title: Is Ohio State recruiting about to pick up? What we learned from visits and what's next
item.description: Ohio State has landed just two commitments in June, but could good news be on the way soon for the Class of 2027?

item.title: Ranking college football’s top 25 players of the 1990s, from Woodson to Moss to Manning
item.description: How do 1990s greats like Charles Woodson, Peyton Manning, Randy Moss and Tommie Frazier stack up? It's a challenging exercise.

item.title: Ranking Ohio State's position groups for 2026 after NFL Draft losses, portal additions
item.description: Ohio State is reloading again after losing 11 NFL Draft picks. Here's how a talented roster stacks up at each position.

item.title: Ranking college football’s top coaches of the 1990s, from Bobby Bowden to Terry Bowden
item.description: Bobby Bowden's Seminoles finished in the top five every season of the decade and won eight ACC titles in eight years in the league.

item.title: Ranking college football's 15 best teams of the 1990s: Is anyone close to '95 Nebraska?
item.description: A decade of heated national championship debates creates some interesting debates when ranking the best teams.

item.title: The 90 things we miss most about college football in the 1990s
item.description: The 1990s were a time of epic competition, change and personality in college football.

item.title: Ohio State's football schedule looks harder than usual. Should it alter expectations?
item.description: Ohio State will face five of the top 17 teams in our post-spring Top 25 rankings, including Nos. 1 and 2, plus a road trip to Iowa.

item.title: How many games will Ohio State win? Who will take home awards? Our early 2026 predictions
item.description: The 2026 football season is less than three months away. Here are some early predictions from our Ohio State expert.

item.title: My favorite offseason personnel move for every Power 4 college football team
item.description: Will the addition of Drew Mestemaker make Oklahoma State a contender in the Big 12? How much will Cam Coleman impact Texas' offense?

item.title: Brendan Sorsby's injunction raises the question: Can the NCAA enforce anything anymore?
item.description: Could the College Football Playoff committee or the Big 12 do something about the Sorsby situation?

item.title: Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: Softball season is over. I’m fully focused on football. At least until I leave on vacation next week. Leave your questions here. Please include your city.

item.title: Will Michigan-Ohio State follow the Duke-UNC model? Your rivalry questions, answered
item.description: Our Michigan and OSU experts break down the state of the rivalry, opposing players each team would want, favorite past games and more.

item.title: Ohio State approves $100 million settlement for victims in school doctor sexual abuse case
item.description: The school previously reached six separate settlements totaling $61 million with 317 other victims.

item.title: How do Ohio State fans feel in 2026? Thoughts on Ryan Day, Michigan, CFP expansion and more
item.description: Ohio State fans always have high expectations. Here's what our survey revealed about the football mood in Columbus in 2026.

item.title: Submit your Michigan and Ohio State questions for our rivalry mailbag!
item.description: Buckeyes expert Cameron Teague Robinson and Wolverines expert Austin Meek are joining forces to answer your rivalry questions.

item.title: College football preseason top-25 rankings for 2026: Man vs. Machine
item.description: One originates from roster talent evaluation and intel, the other from a statistical projection model.

item.title: Ten college football recruiting storylines to watch as official visits heat up
item.description: Will Alabama keep its streak of top-five classes alive? Can Texas Tech hold onto Jalen Brewster? Where does Colton Nussmeier land?

item.title: Who are the biggest recruiting finds at every Power 4 school in the past decade?
item.description: Ladd McConkey, who won two national titles at Georgia, was ranked No. 1,131 in his class. Former LSU star Justin Jefferson was No. 2,174.
